spec.description: OCI OKE Always Free · ARM64 · VM.Standard.A1.Flex (4 OCPU / 24 GB) · Flannel CNI
Number of nodes reporting Ready=true. For Always Free single-node clusters, this should be 1.
spec.title: Nodes Ready

spec.description: Network throughput. Transmitted shown as negative.
spec.title: Network I/O

spec.expr: sum by (persistentvolumeclaim, namespace) (kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes) / sum by (persistentvolumeclaim, namespace) (kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes)

spec.description: PVC usage details. NFS-backed PVCs report the underlying NFS volume capacity, so 'Requested' shows the PVC-declared size.
spec.title: Volume Usage

spec.description: Kubernetes services across all namespaces
spec.title: Services

spec.description: Deployment replica status
spec.title: Deployments

spec.description: Distribution of pods by lifecycle phase
spec.title: Pod Phases

spec.description: DaemonSet desired vs ready replica counts per namespace. Desired and Ready should match.
spec.title: DaemonSets

spec.description: Hourly restart rate per pod. Only pods with restarts shown.
spec.title: Container Restarts

spec.description: CPU cores consumed by each pod (stacked)
spec.title: CPU by Pod

spec.description: Total pods in Running phase across all namespaces.
spec.title: Running Pods

spec.description: Memory working set per pod (stacked)
spec.title: Memory by Pod

spec.description: Cluster events. Filter by Warning/Normal.
spec.title: Kubernetes Events

spec.description: StatefulSet replica status
spec.title: StatefulSets

spec.description: PVC status and requested storage
spec.title: Persistent Volumes

spec.description: Kubernetes node conditions. Ready should be Yes, all pressure conditions should be OK.
spec.title: Node Health

spec.description: Inbound network throughput per pod
spec.title: Network Receive by Pod

spec.description: Outbound network throughput per pod
spec.title: Network Transmit by Pod

spec.description: Total container restarts cluster-wide over the last 24 hours. Spikes warrant inspection of the Container Restarts panel below.
spec.title: Restarts (24h)

spec.description: Total error-level log lines in the last 24 hours across all pods
spec.title: Errors (24h)

spec.description: Total warning-level log lines in the last 24 hours across all pods
spec.title: Warnings (24h)

spec.description: Error and warning log rate over time. Spikes indicate problems worth investigating.
spec.title: Error & Warning Trend

spec.description: Recent error / fatal / panic / exception log lines from non-kube-system namespaces. Empty when nothing matches.
spec.title: Recent Error Logs

spec.description: CPU cores used / allocatable (4 OCPUs)
spec.title: CPU

spec.description: Memory working set as percentage of machine memory (machine_memory_bytes reports kernel-usable RAM, which is slightly less than the 24 GiB OCPU spec).
spec.title: Memory

spec.description: OOM kill events in the last 24 hours
spec.title: OOM Events

spec.description: Container CPU usage vs node capacity (4 OCPUs) and allocatable
spec.title: CPU — Usage vs Capacity (4 Cores)

spec.description: Memory breakdown: Working Set (actual use), RSS (resident), Cache (page cache). Dashed lines show physical total and allocatable.
spec.title: Memory — Usage vs Capacity (24 GiB)

spec.description: Apiserver server-side error rate (HTTP 5xx) per second. Should remain at 0.
spec.title: API Server 5xx Rate

spec.description: 99th percentile read request latency. Burrowed routes excluded.
spec.title: API Server p99 Latency

spec.description: nfs-server-provisioner pod readiness. Loss of readiness causes I/O hangs on every NFS-backed PVC (Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Pyroscope, Alertmanager).
spec.title: NFS Provisioner Ready

spec.description: Restart count of nfs-server-provisioner over the last 24h. Restart triggers brief I/O hang on all consumers.
spec.title: NFS Provisioner Restarts (24h)

spec.description: Request rate broken down by HTTP verb. Useful for spotting controller-loops or rogue clients.
spec.title: API Server Request Rate by Verb

spec.description: Request duration percentiles for read verbs. Watch for steady upward drift.
spec.title: API Server Latency p50/p95/p99

spec.description: Worker node root filesystem (/) usage. Filling /var causes kubelet to evict pods and ImagePullBackOff loops.
spec.title: Root Filesystem Usage

spec.description: Linux netfilter connection tracking table usage. At 100% the kernel silently drops new connections.
spec.title: Conntrack Table Usage

spec.description: Node-level allocated vs maximum file descriptors. Exhaustion causes 'too many open files' across all workloads.
spec.title: File Descriptor Usage

spec.description: Read/write throughput on the worker boot volume. Saturated I/O causes kubelet liveness probes to time out.
spec.title: Disk I/O — Boot Volume

spec.description: Lines/sec ingested by Loki distributors. A flatline at zero while pods are running indicates an Alloy or distributor problem.
spec.title: Loki — Log Lines Received

spec.description: Loki HTTP 5xx response rate. Sustained errors block ingestion or query.
spec.title: Loki — Server 5xx Rate by Route

spec.description: Spans/sec ingested by Tempo distributor. Zero indicates the OTLP receiver is not reachable from clients.
spec.title: Tempo — Spans Received

spec.description: Tempo HTTP 5xx response rate.
spec.title: Tempo — Server 5xx Rate by Route

spec.description: Up signal for Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Pyroscope, Alertmanager and Grafana. Each cell should report 1.
spec.title: Observability Pods Up

spec.description: Highest 5-minute average CPU consumers across the cluster.
spec.title: Top 10 Pods by CPU

spec.description: Highest current memory consumers across the cluster.
spec.title: Top 10 Pods by Memory (Working Set)

spec.description: Number of cloudflared pods reporting ready. Loss of tunnel = no external ingress.
spec.title: Tunnel Pods Ready

spec.description: cloudflared restart count over the last 24h. Frequent restarts indicate edge connection instability or OOM.
spec.title: Tunnel Pod Restarts (24h)

spec.description: cloudflared per-pod CPU (5m rate of cumulative seconds).
spec.title: Tunnel CPU Usage

spec.description: cloudflared per-pod working set memory.
spec.title: Tunnel Memory Usage
